questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Triggers & Audits?
options: Inefficient scaling of AFTER/BEFORE trigger operations, execution contexts.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of AFTER/BEFORE trigger operations, execution contexts.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how AFTER/BEFORE trigger operations, execution contexts scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
